name: Fanuc CNC 精铣工位
description: FANUC Series 0i-MF数控系统，精铣工位：主轴约6000RPM，进给约300mm/min，切深小，表面粗糙度Ra0.8~1.6，要求主轴稳定性高

points.name: spindle_speed
points.description: 主轴实际转速，精铣工位：空闲为0，启动后稳定在约6000RPM，精铣对转速稳定性要求高，波动小

points.name: feed_rate
points.description: 精铣实际进给速度：切入阶段低速，稳定精铣约300mm/min，精铣进给慢且稳定，波动小

points.name: spindle_current
points.description: 精铣主轴电流：空闲约2A，启动约4A，切入峰值约11A，稳定精铣约7~10A，精铣切深小电流低且稳定

points.name: vibration_x
points.description: X轴振动加速度，精铣切深小但转速高，振动幅值小、频率高

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 120
if 28 <= t < 100:
    base = 0.18 + 0.1 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 28 + 0.8)
else:
    base = 0.05
noise = random.uniform(-0.04, 0.04)
result = round(max(0.02, base + noise), 3)

points.name: vibration_y
points.description: Y轴振动加速度，精铣切深小但转速高，振动幅值小、频率高

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 120
if 28 <= t < 100:
    base = 0.18 + 0.1 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 22 + 1.8)
else:
    base = 0.05
noise = random.uniform(-0.04, 0.04)
result = round(max(0.02, base + noise), 3)

points.name: vibration_z
points.description: Z轴振动加速度，精铣切深小但转速高，振动幅值小、频率高

generator_config.script:
elapsed = context['elapsed']; t = elapsed % 120
if 28 <= t < 100:
    base = 0.2 + 0.12 * math.sin(2 * math.pi * elapsed / 18 + 2.8)
else:
    base = 0.06
noise = random.uniform(-0.05, 0.05)
result = round(max(0.02, base + noise), 3)

points.name: spindle_load
points.description: 精铣主轴负载率，稳定阶段约15~28%，切入瞬间约32%，精铣切深小负载低且稳定，短时允许到120%

points.name: exec_status
points.description: 执行状态(0=空闲 1=运行 2=暂停 3=M00停 4=M01停)

points.name: tool_no
points.description: 当前刀具号，精铣工位固定使用T3
